item.title: Order ID Cards Make [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: Order ID Cards Make [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: printableidcard1
item.itunes:summary:
Order ID Cards Make
(Office Apps)
Make employee identity cards with unique data. Generate student badges of various colors using Order ID Cards Maker tool. How to make multiple student badges? Just download Order ID Cards Maker software from company www.printableidcardsmaker.com website and use inbuilt creative tool. Student card creator application generates and modifies cards with customized ID cards. Advanced Order ID Cards Maker application available at company www.printableidcardsmaker.com site makes business cards without taking any expert advice. Software offers inbuilt creative objects as line, pencils, ellipse, etc while adding images and pictures to badges.

item.title: FixVare EML to MBOX Converter [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: FixVare EML to MBOX Converter [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: nikhrahul
item.itunes:summary:
FixVare EML to MBOX Converter
(Utilities)
The FixVare EML to MBOX Conversion Tool accurately converts EML files to the MBOX file format. The utility facilitates the effortless switch from Windows Live Mail to Thunderbird MBOX file format. Thousands of EML files are exported into MBOX file format with just a few clicks. The software does not change the actual folder hierarchy or email properties during the conversion of EML files to MBOX. This tool contains only three to four straightforward procedures for the conversion of EML files to MBOX file format. In order to convert EML files to MBOX file format, no additional tool installation is necessary. EML files are exported into MBOX file format, while all attachments are effectively preserved within emails. The program is sufficiently secure and does not impose any restrictions on the size or quantity of EML files that can be converted to MBOX format. Users can efficiently operate this tool as a result of its guideline interface. The software functions can be evaluated by downloading the freeware EML to MBOX Conversion Tool, which enables the conversion of 25 EML files into MBOX file format at no cost. Once users decide that this program is suitable for them, the access keys will be sent to their email addresses. The application is easily downloaded on Windows 11, 10, 8, 7, XP, and Vista, among other operating systems. Our customer support team is at your disposal at all times.

[read more]

item.title: Wedding Invitation Card Software [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: Wedding Invitation Card Software [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: printableidcard1
item.itunes:summary:
Wedding Invitation Card Software
(Office Apps)
Tool makes printable wedding invitation cards. For developing stunning marriage cards via Wedding Invitation Card Software. Affordable Wedding Invitation Card Software creates versatile marriage cards in simplified way. Maker utility for wedding cards easily generates great looking wedding cards in cost-efficient manner. Outstanding Wedding Invitation Card Software provides simple steps to design colorful wedding invitation cards in comprehensive manner. Cost effective Marriage card designing application gives extraordinary facility to craft and print bulk number of wedding cards in few countable mouse clicks. Marriage invitation card creator utility generates professional looking stunning wedding wishing cards without any prior technical knowledge. Award winning Wedding Invitation Card Software empowers technical user to create colorful marriage invitation cards according to user’s choice. Best wedding card making program is used for crafting beautiful marriage cards using image designing objects like line, pencil, text, color, rectangle, ellipse etc.

[read more]

item.title: WholeClear NSF to PST Converter [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: WholeClear NSF to PST Converter [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: whole-clear
item.itunes:summary:
WholeClear NSF to PST Converter
(Utilities)
WholeClear NSF to PST Converter is an application for fulfilling the conversion method from NSF files to PST format. It requires the setup of Lotus Notes for the migration of files. There are no file size restrictions. It exports all the attachments from NSF file format to PST file with all the safety measures. It grants the selective file migration from NSF to PST. The outcome file can be saved locally by the user.
Features

• It has a user-friendly interface.
• Effective application for converting NSF files to PST with no losing any data.
• Allows batch conversion of NSF mails to the PST file type.
• Provide a preview feature to examine all NSF mail data.
• Ability to convert Lotus Notes mailboxes without any file size constraints.
• It works with Lotus Notes 6.5, 7.0, 8.5, 9.0, 9.0.1, and 10.01.
• Works with every edition of Windows OS and Microsoft Outlook.
• This tool lets users convert the first 25 emails from NSF to PST files for free in a trial version.
• The licensed version allows you limitless transfer of files from NSF to PST format.
[read more]

[read more]

Professionally designed Printable ID Cards Maker Software is available on www.printableidcardsmaker.com website that allows home users to create high quality identity cards for business purpose. Download technically advance ID card creator utility from URL www.printableidcardsmaker.com that is integrated with latest methodology to build high resolution business ID card. Simple to install Printable ID Cards Maker Software empowers business users to create attractive and unique identity cards with help of inbuilt designing objects like ellipse, arc, line, text etc.

item.title: Printable Greeting Cards Maker [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: Printable Greeting Cards Maker [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: printableidcard1
item.itunes:summary:
Printable Greeting Cards Maker
(Office Apps)
New Year occasion card maker tool. Printable Greeting Cards Maker program develops colorful invitation cards. Now download Printable Greeting Cards Maker software on your Windows PC that provides you best way to develop birthday wishes and invitation cards in multiple patterns which suits you best. Printable Greeting Cards Maker application easily designs greeting cards in different pattern which suits your business needs and patterns. Greeting card making tool supports Windows operating system for developing invitation cards in your pattern using designing tools like pencil, text, color etc. Would you like to generate interactive and colorful interactive wedding invitations and other occasion cards, and then start using Printable Greeting Cards Maker program on your Windows PC that helps to design with the help of different designing tools like pencil, text, circle, rectangle etc. without any need o applying programming skills. Generate cards program consists of printing settings used to print them on single sheet of paper for future use.

item.title: FixVare TGZ to EML Converter [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: FixVare TGZ to EML Converter [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: sufykure
item.itunes:summary:
FixVare TGZ to EML Converter
(Utilities)
The FixVare TGZ to EML Converter is the best program for converting TGZ files to EML files quickly and correctly. Independent of the folder size, the user can choose any TGZ file for conversion to EML format. This application maintains the email meta properties—including from, to, CC, and BC fields. Without respect to any size restriction, this tool lets the user export TGZ files to EML in any size. It supports all versions of Windows, including 11, 10, 8.1, 8, and previous ones. The clear user interface of the program makes it easy. One is not obliged to be a technical specialist. FixVare TGZ to EML Converter provides a free demo for evaluation of its features. The user can quickly assess the features and capacity of the program. Only a limited amount of data can be converted for free, nevertheless, those with a licensed version have unlimited access to data conversion. Our technical support staff is always ready to help users with their questions and reacts fast.

[read more]

item.itunes:author: printableidcard1
item.itunes:summary:
Printable ID Cards Maker
(Office Apps)
Program designs student identity cards. Printable ID Cards Maker creates various kinds of ID cards in convenient way.>Click on website www.printableidcardsmaker.com for downloading Printable ID Cards Maker tool that helps to generate employee ID cards in rectangle, rounded and ellipse shapes as per user’s choice and requirement very easily in few mouse clicks. Printable ID Cards Maker software is easily available at company website link www.printableidcardsmaker.com which allows you to design best quality printable student identification cards in an easiest manner. Tool also provides option of saving created cards at user specified location on laptop. Utility creates employee ID badges in very easy manner.ID card generating application helps in developing various ID cards like student identity cards, employee identity cards, security guard cards etc. very easily without any help from technical expertise. Printable ID Cards Maker utility easily finds at www.printableidcardsmaker.com which helps in designing various attractive cards and stickers by several designing tools inbuilt in utility easily in very short interval of time.

item.title: FixVare NSF to PDF Converter [File Management]
item.itunes:title: FixVare NSF to PDF Converter [File Management]
item.itunes:author: nikjhon
item.itunes:summary:
FixVare NSF to PDF Converter
(File Management)
The FixVare NSF to PDF Converter software is capable of converting NSF files into PDF format without affecting the original mailbox content. Accuracy is preserved during the conversion of NSF files to PDF files. Users have the ability to select multiple NSF database files that they wish to convert into PDF files without any disturbances. Users can add multiple NSF files to the list for batch conversion. The Lotus Notes to PDF Converter software is designed with a basic and user-friendly interface. No additional technical expertise is necessary to install and operate the software. The interface of this Converter software is exceptional. It only takes a few minutes to move Lotus Notes NSF data to PDF format. This application is completely secure, so there is no need to be concerned about data loss. No restrictions are imposed on the quantity of data that users can save in the PDF format, users are free to select any size NSF file or folder. Users can complete the conversion of NSF emails to PDF files on a variety of operating systems, including Windows 11, 10, 8, 8.1, 7, Vista, XP, and Windows 2000. Users of this software can effortlessly save the export data on their computer at the desired destination. This software enables the conversion of email attributes and formatting. The first 25 items from each folder can be exported by downloading the freeware FixVare NSF to PDF Converter. It allows users to evaluate the product before getting the paid version of the software.

[read more]
